column1: TC-2M526L;Part details panel shows all defined fields including IPN
column8: part-details;"Given a part exists with IPN 'IC-555-DIP8'

column1: Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Timer IC 555'
When the user clicks the 'Show Part Details' toggle button
Then the details panel displays IPN 'IC-555-DIP8'
TC-GRNX7C;Part details are visible when Show Part Details toggle is enabled;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/views/#part-details;positive;part-views
Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for 'Capacitor 100nF'
When the user clicks the 'Show Part Details' toggle button in the header panel
Then the header panel expands to show the IPN 'CAP-100NF-0402'
